question.text: The S&P GSCI (Goldman Sachs Commodity Index) was originally developed in which year?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** The S&P GSCI was originally developed in 1991 by Goldman Sachs. Ownership transferred to Standard & Poor's in 2007, who currently own and publish it. **The Trap:** 1877 is the LME establishment. 2007 is when ownership transferred to S&P. 2019 is the SEBI commodity index circular. **Cross-Exam Context:** Global commodity index awareness is relevant across derivative exams. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** The S&P GSCI is heavily energy-weighted — it serves as a global benchmark for commodity investment but doesn't necessarily reflect Indian commodity market dynamics.
